+- KotlinFile[]
   +- PackageHeader[]
   +- ImportList[]
   +- TopLevelObject[]
   |  +- Declaration[]
   |  |  +- ClassDeclaration[@Identifier = "Foo", @Modifiers = null]
   |  |     +- T-CLASS[@Text = "class"]
   |  |     +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |     |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "Foo"]
   |  |     +- ClassBody[]
   |  |        +- T-LCURL[@Text = "{"]
   |  |        +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |        +- ClassMemberDeclarations[]
   |  |        |  +- ClassMemberDeclaration[]

   |  |        |  |     +- FunctionDeclaration[@Identifier = "foo", @Modifiers = null]
   |  |        |  |        +- T-FUN[@Text = "fun"]
   |  |        |  |        +- SimpleIdentifier[]
   |  |        |  |        |  +- T-Identifier[@Text = "foo"]

   |  |        |  |        |  +- T-LPAREN[@Text = "("]
   |  |        |  |        |  +- T-RPAREN[@Text = ")"]

   |  |        |  |              +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]

   |  |        |  |              |  |           +- Disjunction[]

   |  |        |     +- T-NL[@Text = "\n"]
   |  |        +- T-RCURL[@Text = "}"]

   +- EOF[@Text = "<EOF>"]
